title: ODDMAR - Viking Adventure
description: Guide Oddmar the Viking through perilous lands in this side-scrolling platformer adventure. Navigate hand-crafted levels filled with enemies, environmental hazards, and physics-based puzzles. Collect magical weapons and shields to unlock new combat abilities. Your goal is to complete all levels by reaching the exit portal while avoiding damage and bottomless pits. You have 3 health points - use them wisely!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move Oddmar left or right
Arrow Up: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Space: Attack with current weapon
Z: Use shield ability (when shield is collected)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: The House of Da Vinci III
description: Navigate through Leonardo da Vinci's mysterious workshop by solving intricate mechanical puzzles across three interconnected rooms. Use the legendary Oculus Perpetua to view and manipulate the past, altering objects to affect the present timeline. Collect items, examine objects closely, and combine tools to unlock mechanisms. Each puzzle solved opens the next chamber, leading you deeper into da Vinci's secrets. Complete all three rooms to escape and uncover the final revelation.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move camera view (rotate view around the room)
Space: Interact with highlighted object / Use selected item
Z: Toggle Oculus Perpetua (view past/present)
Shift: Examine selected object closely
Number Keys (1-3): Select inventory item
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Halls of Torment
description: Battle through the Halls of Torment as a lone hero facing endless waves of monsters. Survive for 5 minutes while collecting experience orbs to level up and choose powerful abilities. Defeat enemies to gain gold and find rare items that enhance your stats. Face increasingly dangerous foes and mighty bosses that spawn at regular intervals. Your run ends if your health reaches zero, but each attempt makes you stronger.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your hero in four directions
Space: Activate special ability (when unlocked)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
ENTER: Start game from title screen
R: Return to start screen after game over

title: Sanctuary Quest
description: Welcome to Sanctuary Quest, a dungeon exploration and base management RPG. Build your Sanctuary by managing workers to generate food and materials. Recruit heroes from different classes, equip them, and venture into dangerous dungeons filled with monsters, traps, and treasures. Use tactical combat with timed abilities to defeat enemies. Progress through multiple dungeon zones, unlock advanced hero classes, and reach the Arena at Zone 3 to achieve victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move party in dungeons
Space: Select/Confirm actions in menus and base management
Z: Use hero abilities in combat (cycles through party members)
Shift: Speed up resource collection and combat animations
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)

title: Castle Alchemy: Alchemist's Magical Journey
description: Enter the depths of a mysterious underground castle as an alchemist. Manage your castle's resources, craft equipment using time-based alchemy, and assemble a team of adventurers to explore dangerous mazes. Navigate through interconnected nodes to uncover treasures and resources. Progress by delving deeper, unlocking new crafting recipes and powerful job classes. Balance resource management with strategic exploration to survive the depths.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate maze nodes, select options in menus
Space: Confirm selection, advance time (hold to speed up idle crafting)
Z: Switch between Castle Management and Maze Exploration modes
Shift: Quick-craft when in crafting menu (uses materials instantly)

title: Chameleon Run
description: Race through dynamic platforming levels as a color-shifting chameleon! Your character runs automatically, gaining speed as you progress. Match your color (pink or yellow) to the platforms you land on, or face instant failure. Collect tokens, avoid black obstacles, and complete levels within time limits to earn stars and unlock new stages. Master precise jumps and color switches to achieve the fastest times!
controls:
Arrow Up / Space: Jump over gaps and obstacles
Arrow Left: Switch to Pink color
Arrow Right: Switch to Yellow color
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: THE PAST WITHIN
description: "The Past Within" is a cooperative puzzle adventure where two players collaborate across time. One player explores a 2D Past environment while another navigates a 3D Future environment. Players must communicate externally to share clues, solve interconnected puzzles, and progress through 2 chapters. Click on objects to examine or interact with them, and use information from your partner to unlock mechanisms in your timeline. Complete all puzzles in both chapters to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor/selection in menus and navigate between objects
Space: Interact with selected object (examine, collect, use)
Z: Use held item on selected object
Shift: Switch between Past and Future perspectives (single-player mode)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Dragon Quest Builders
description: Welcome to Dragon Quest Builders! You are a legendary builder tasked with restoring the ruined world of Alefgard. Explore a block-based world, gather materials by breaking blocks, craft tools and items, and construct buildings to complete quests. Defend your settlement from monster attacks and unlock new recipes as you progress. Complete quests to restore the land and prove yourself as the ultimate builder!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move player around the world
Space: Break block (hold to break, releases materials) / Attack enemy
Z: Place block from inventory / Interact with NPCs
Shift: Open/Close crafting menu (when available)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: Iron Marines - Tactical RTS
description: Command your elite squad through tactical real-time strategy combat! Deploy units, upgrade them on the battlefield, and use powerful hero abilities to defeat waves of enemies. Capture strategic points, build defensive turrets, and complete objectives to progress through challenging missions. Manage your energy wisely to deploy units, upgrade them, and activate devastating special abilities. Victory requires strategic positioning, smart unit composition, and timely use of hero powers!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Scroll the map and navigate menus
Space: Deploy selected unit at cursor position / Select units
Z: Activate hero ability (when available)
Shift: Cycle through available unit types
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: Knight and Dragon 2: Age of Madness
description: Lead a party of four active heroes through a hack-and-slash RPG adventure! Your heroes automatically attack nearby enemies in real-time combat. Activate powerful character skills using number keys (1-4) to turn the tide of battle. Defeat enemies to collect randomized loot and gain experience. Equipment is automatically equipped to boost your stats. Progress through multiple story missions, unlock higher classes for your heroes, and survive the infinite dungeon for endless challenges!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move party leader (all party members follow)
Space: Dash forward quickly
Z: Use special party-wide ability (when charged)
1-4: Activate hero-specific skills (with cooldowns)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: TONE SPHERE
description: Tone Sphere is a rhythm game where musical notes emerge from the edges of the screen and travel towards a central target zone. Time your key presses perfectly as notes reach the center to score points and build combos. Different colored notes require different keys. Miss too many notes and your health will deplete, ending the song early. Complete songs to unlock new tracks and increase difficulty for higher scores!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←↑→↓): Hit corresponding colored directional notes
Space: Hit white circular notes
Z: Hit blue square notes
Shift: Hit special orange triangle notes
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: 幻境双生 - Mirage Memorial
description: Navigate through dual-world puzzles in Mirage Memorial! Control Retna, a character trapped between the Normal World and Inner World. Switch between dimensions to manipulate the environment—move blocks, activate switches, and open pathways. Each world affects the other, so think strategically! Collect all memory crystals and reach the exit to complete each level. Features a map editor to design your own mind-bending puzzles.
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move Retna left or right
Space: Jump
Z: Switch between Normal World (blue) and Inner World (purple)
Shift: Interact with blocks and switches
Enter: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 喫茶ブレンド物語 (Cafe Blend Story)
description: Welcome to Cafe Blend Story! You are the owner of a small cafe with big dreams. Serve customers by creating delicious drinks and food recipes, manage your cafe layout, and earn money to expand your business. Customers arrive with different preferences and moods - satisfy them to earn revenue and reputation. Unlock new ingredients, upgrade your cafe with furniture, and work towards achieving a prestigious five-star rating. Balance customer satisfaction, efficient service, and strategic expansion to build the ultimate cafe empire!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu cursor / Move selected item
Space: Select/Confirm action (place furniture, serve customer, combine ingredients)
Z: Cancel/Go back
Shift: Open quick menu (recipe creation, furniture placement, view stats)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Burger Chain Story
description: Run a burger restaurant empire! Combine ingredients to create signature burgers, serve customers to earn money, and expand your chain. Unlock new ingredients from suppliers, hire staff to boost efficiency, and compete against rival shops. Your goal is to maximize profits, customer satisfaction, and reputation while opening multiple branches to dominate the burger market.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select options
Space: Confirm selection, serve customers, create burgers
Z: Quick action (skip/speed up animations)
Shift: View detailed info/switch views
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart game

title: RPG Elpisia's Magic Sword Girl
description: Enter the world of Elpisia as Aldo, a warrior who fights alongside Eris, a magical sword maiden. Battle through dungeons in turn-based combat, managing HP, MP, and Action Points (AP) to unleash devastating weapon skills. Transform Eris into powerful magic swords that unlock unique abilities. Level up, enhance your weapons, and defeat increasingly challenging enemies to save the kingdom. Strategic use of skills and the Charge command to recover AP is key to victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move in exploration mode
Space: Confirm selection / Interact
Z: Cancel / Back in menus
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: 달의 전설 (Legend of the Moon)
description: Navigate through dangerous dungeons filled with monsters in this action RPG. Defeat enemies to collect gold and powerful equipment that enhances your stats. Progress through increasingly difficult rooms, manage your skills and cooldowns, and survive to reach the final boss. Your goal is to clear all rooms in the dungeon and defeat the boss without letting your HP reach zero.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Basic attack (melee range)
Z: Use Skill 1 - Fireball (ranged attack, 5s cooldown)
Shift: Use Skill 2 - Heal (restore HP, 10s cooldown)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Space Marshals
description: You are a tactical specialist navigating dangerous enemy territory. Your mission: eliminate all hostiles while using cover, stealth, and strategic positioning. Use environmental cover to reduce damage, flank enemies for bonus damage, and deploy tactical gear wisely. Sneak past patrols or eliminate them silently. Complete missions to unlock better weapons and armor. Stay alert—enemy awareness is indicated by visual cones. Your health is precious; reach zero and the mission fails.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Fire your equipped weapon / Use selected utility item
Z: Switch between primary and secondary weapons
Shift: Toggle stealth mode (crouch/stand)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the start screen

title: Gunfire Reborn
description: Roguelite FPS adventure where you battle through procedurally generated rooms filled with enemies. Collect weapons, scrolls, and gold to power up your hero. Defeat elite enemies and bosses to progress through acts. Each death means starting over, but permanent upgrades make you stronger for the next run. Clear all rooms and defeat the final boss to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your hero (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Fire weapon / Confirm selection
Shift: Use active skill (cooldown-based)
Z: Swap weapon
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: ROOT: Woodland Warfare
description: Command your woodland faction to victory! Control territories, build structures, and manage resources across a strategic map. Each faction has unique abilities: Marquise builds workshops for victory points, Alliance spreads sympathy to recruit warriors, Eyrie follows decrees for power, and Vagabond travels light collecting items. Reach 30 victory points first to win through clever positioning, faction-specific strategies, and tactical combat.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and move units between adjacent clearings
Space: Confirm selection, execute actions, and resolve combat
Z: Cancel current selection or action
Shift: Toggle between available actions for selected unit

title: Dungeon Survival
description: Assemble a party of heroes and delve into the dangerous dungeons of Black Haze. Navigate through randomly generated levels, engage in turn-based combat against monsters, collect powerful loot, and level up your heroes. Each hero has unique abilities - use them strategically to survive increasingly difficult encounters. Your goal is to reach dungeon level 5 and defeat the final boss. If all party members fall in battle, it's game over.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate dungeon tiles and menu selections
Space: Confirm action / Select party member in combat
Z: Use basic attack in combat / Cancel in menus
Shift: Access skill menu in combat
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)

title: Dark Kingdom Tower Defense
description: Defend your dark kingdom against waves of heroic invaders! Strategically place powerful towers along enemy paths, upgrade them during battle, and deploy your hero to turn the tide. Earn gold to strengthen defenses, collect stars for permanent upgrades, and survive increasingly challenging waves. Prevent 20 enemies from reaching the end or face defeat!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move hero character
Space: Place/Select tower at hero location
Z: Upgrade selected tower or activate hero ability
Shift: Sell selected tower
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Idle Acorns
description: Idle Acorns is a progressive resource management game where you build a thriving woodland economy. Start by collecting acorns manually, then purchase upgrades to automate your production. Unlock four distinct areas: the Shop for upgrades, the Fishing Pond for catching fish, the Garden for growing crops, and the Campfire for cooking and trading. Craft 24 unique items, upgrade passive income sources, and watch your acorn empire grow. There's no game over—just continuous expansion and achievement!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between different areas (Shop, Pond, Garden, Campfire)
Space: Collect acorns manually / Cast fishing line / Plant seeds / Cook items
Z: Purchase upgrades / Catch fish / Harvest crops / Trade items
Shift: Toggle automation on/off for purchased upgrades
Enter: Start game from menu
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Only You Are Here
description: You awaken in a surreal, fragmented world where memories and reality blur. Navigate through mysterious rooms, solve environmental puzzles, and collect memory fragments to piece together your story. Beware of the lurking Shadow Entity that hunts you in certain areas. Your choices matter—discover secrets, unlock different paths, and reach one of multiple endings. Will you uncover the truth, or remain lost forever?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects (doors, items, mechanisms)
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Z: Use collected items on interactive objects
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from start screen)
ENTER: Start game (from start screen)

title: Red's First Flight
description: Launch birds from a slingshot to destroy structures and eliminate all pigs! Drag the bird back to aim and set power, then release to fire. Complete levels by eliminating all pigs with limited birds. Earn up to 3 stars based on your score. Progress through increasingly challenging levels with different structures and defenses.
controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Adjust slingshot aim angle
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Adjust slingshot power
Space: Launch the bird
R: Restart (available on game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/Unpause game

title: ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)
description: Welcome to ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)! Build and expand your dream amusement park on a grid. Place attractions to attract guests who generate income and satisfaction. Use your earnings to research new rides and expand your park. Scout mascots annually to boost popularity and unlock themed zones. Your goal is to reach Rank 1 in the national rankings by maximizing guest satisfaction and park popularity. Balance your budget, manage space wisely, and keep guests happy!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/grid selection
Space: Confirm selection (place attraction, research, expand)
Shift: Toggle between Build/Research/Expand modes
Z: Cancel current action or go back

title: 🌊 Waterpark Story
description: Welcome to Waterpark Story! Build and manage your dream water park by placing pools, slides, and facilities on a grid. Attract guests who generate income and satisfaction points. Serve them food and drinks, gift them items like tubes and swimsuits, and they'll become your SNS friends, helping your park grow. Expand your park, unlock new attractions, and create a highly-rated destination that keeps guests happy and coming back for more!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu and select grid tiles
Space: Place selected item or interact with guests
Z: Open/close build menu or cancel action
Shift: Speed up guest movement (hold)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: 🌲 Little Berry Forest Story 🌲
description: Welcome to Little Berry Forest! You are a young explorer in a magical forest filled with adorable characters and delicious berries. Your goal is to meet all the forest friends, collect ingredients, cook dishes using recipes, and complete mini-game challenges. Explore the forest by moving around, interact with characters to unlock their stories, gather berries and ingredients, and discover new recipes. Complete all character interactions and cook at least 5 unique dishes to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character around the forest
Space: Interact with characters, pick up items, and confirm actions in cooking/mini-games
Z: Open/close cooking menu when near the cooking station
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Return to start screen (restart)

title: Meridian Island Escape
description: Escape from Meridian Island by exploring mysterious environments, solving intricate puzzles, and uncovering secrets. Navigate through interconnected scenes, collect and combine items in your inventory, decipher cryptic codes, and manipulate objects to unlock new areas. Each puzzle you solve brings you closer to freedom. Your goal: reach the final escape location and complete your journey off the island.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between scenes (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT when arrows are visible)
Z Key: Interact with highlighted objects or use selected inventory items
Space: Select/deselect items in inventory
Shift: Combine selected inventory items
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: 常夏プールパレス
description: Welcome to 常夏プールパレス (Tropical Pool Palace)! Build and manage your dream tropical pool resort. Place facilities like pools, slides, and restaurants on your grid-based resort map to attract customers and earn money. Keep customer satisfaction high by offering diverse attractions and fulfilling their needs. Earn SNS buzz points to unlock new buildings and grow your resort. Balance your budget, expand strategically, and create the ultimate vacation destination!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/select facilities in build menu
Space: Place selected facility on the grid
Z: Toggle build menu on/off
Shift: Speed up time (hold)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to title screen

title: Word Lookup Pro
description: Word Lookup Pro is a word puzzle game where you search through a massive dictionary to find valid words and create anagrams. Type letters to search for matching words, use wildcards (? for single letters, * for multiple) to find patterns, or switch to Anagram mode to discover all possible words from your letters. Each word has a point value based on letter scoring. Challenge yourself to find high-scoring words, discover rare combinations, and expand your vocabulary through various word lists and puzzle modes!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and word lists
Space: Toggle between Search and Anagram modes
A-Z Keys: Type letters into the search field
Shift: Toggle uppercase (visual only)
Z: Backspace/delete last letter
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: TVスタジオ物語
description: Manage your own TV studio and create hit programs! Select genres and themes, cast talented hosts, and design studio sets to boost ratings. Each program you produce earns viewership ratings and SNS buzz, which unlock new content and talent. Balance talent skills with set design to create synergy and achieve high ratings. Reach 1000 fans to win by producing successful shows and building your studio empire!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move cursor in studio layout
Space: Confirm selection / Place set piece
Z: Cancel / Go back
Shift: Toggle between planning modes (Genre/Theme → Talent → Set Design)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

title: Templar Conspiracy
description: Uncover a mysterious Templar conspiracy in this point-and-click adventure. Explore richly detailed locations, examine objects, collect items, and solve environmental puzzles. Combine inventory items and interact with hotspots to progress through the story. Your goal is to solve all puzzles across multiple locations and reveal the truth behind the conspiracy.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between menu options and hotspots
Space: Examine/interact with selected hotspot or use inventory item
Z: Open/close inventory menu
Shift: Combine selected inventory items
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Destins - Le Jeu De La Vie 2
description: Navigate life's journey in this digital board game! Spin the wheel to move along a winding path filled with life-changing decisions. Make choices about education, career, relationships, and property that affect your Knowledge, Wealth, and Happiness scores. Land on event spaces to trigger special opportunities and challenges. Reach the Retirement space to tally your final score—the highest combined total wins! Unlock cosmetic rewards by achieving milestones along the way.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and make choices at decision points
Space: Spin the wheel to move forward
Z: Confirm selections and advance through events
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Escape: Pause/unpause the game
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: MAGICUS
description: MAGICUS is a match-3 RPG where you battle enemies by matching colored runes on a grid. Match 3+ runes of the same color to attack enemies and charge elemental meters. Fill a meter completely to unlock devastating magic spells. Defeat enemies to earn gold, level up your character, and progress through increasingly challenging stages. Manage your HP carefully - if it reaches zero, the game is over!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor on the rune grid
Space: Select/swap runes to create matches
Z: Cast charged spell (when meter is full)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Innocent Revenger - Wall Maiden & Miden Tower
description: Command your party through the mysterious Miden Tower in this tactical RPG! Battle enemies using turn-based formation combat where positioning matters. Your unique hero, Mule the Wall Maiden, can merge with walls for defense. Defeat enemies to gain experience, level up to 999, unlock over 100 passive skills, and transmute items in your kiln. Complete floors to progress through the tower and face the ultimate boss!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, select party member/action/target
Space: Confirm selection in battle menu
Z: Cancel/go back in menus
Shift: Open transmutation menu (when available)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen

title: Department Store Tycoon
description: Build and manage a thriving multi-story department store! Place different shop types on floors to attract customers. Fulfill customer requests to increase satisfaction and earn revenue. Expand your building vertically, unlock new facilities, and work toward achieving a prestigious 5-star rating. Balance customer needs, manage your budget, and create the ultimate shopping destination.
controls:
Arrow Keys (↑/↓): Navigate between floors and menu options
Space: Select/Place shop or confirm action
Shift: Toggle shop selection menu
Z: Remove selected shop (when hovering over a shop)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

title: Streets of Fury
description: Streets of Fury is a side-scrolling beat 'em up where you fight through waves of enemies across multiple stages. Defeat all enemies to advance through the stage, use combos to maximize your score, and watch out for increasingly dangerous foes. Break objects for health pickups and score bonuses. Defeat the boss at the end to win the game!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right and navigate menus
Space: Attack/Punch (chain for combos)
Z: Special Attack (uses health)
Shift: Grab nearby enemies
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 2112TD: Tower Defense Survival
description: Defend your mobile command center against waves of alien invaders in this tower defense survival game. Deploy and upgrade towers (Machine Gun, Flamethrower, Cannon, Plasma) along a fixed path to destroy enemies before they reach your base. Each tower can be upgraded twice for enhanced power. Manage resources wisely and survive multiple waves to win. If any enemy reaches your command center, the game is over.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select towers and positions
Space: Place selected tower / Upgrade selected tower / Confirm action
Z: Cancel selection / Deselect tower
Shift: Speed up game (2x speed when held)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: LIMBO
description: You are a boy lost in a dark, mysterious world. Navigate through dangerous environments filled with deadly traps, hostile creatures, and physics-based puzzles. Push crates, swing on ropes, activate levers, and avoid instant-death hazards like bear traps and giant spiders. Use precise timing and environmental interactions to survive. Your goal is to reach the end of this haunting journey through checkpoints that automatically save your progress.
controls:
Left Arrow: Move left
Right Arrow: Move right
Space: Jump
Z: Grab/interact with objects (hold to maintain grip)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause
R: Restart to title screen

title: RPG Crystal Osa
description: RPG Crystal Osa is a turn-based RPG where you lead a party of heroes through dungeons filled with monsters. Battle enemies to gain experience, level up your characters, and learn new skills. Collect Ores from defeated enemies to craft powerful equipment. Your goal is to defeat the final boss on floor 5. If all party members fall in battle, it's game over.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, select battle actions, move in dungeons
Space: Confirm selection, advance dialogue
Shift: Cancel, go back in menus
Z: Open party menu (during dungeon exploration)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Dungeon Warfare
description: Defend your dungeon core from waves of invading adventurers by strategically placing traps along their path. Purchase and upgrade traps using gold earned from defeating enemies. Each trap has unique abilities - from dart shooters to spring launchers to lava flows. Prevent 20 adventurers from reaching your core to win. Watch your gold and plan carefully, as trap placement is permanent once confirmed!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate trap selection menu and grid positions
Space: Confirm trap placement or upgrade selection
Z: Cancel current action or deselect trap
Shift: Speed up enemy wave spawning (hold)
Enter: Start game from START screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to START screen)

title: タイムサーファー (Time Surfer)
description: Surf across cosmic platforms while collecting gems and avoiding obstacles! The cosmic end chases you from the left - stay ahead or perish. Dive to gain speed down slopes, release to rise up. Use your limited time rewind ability to undo mistakes and escape danger. Collect gems to increase your score and survive as long as possible!
controls:
SPACE: Hold to dive (gain speed), Release to rise
Z: Activate time rewind (costs time energy)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Zombie Night Terror
description: Command your zombie horde through dangerous facilities! Your zombies walk automatically, but you must strategically mutate them to overcome obstacles and defenses. Convert all humans to grow your horde, destroy barriers with exploders, and reach the exit. Manage your mutation points wisely—they're earned by infecting humans. Fail if all zombies die or critical humans escape!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move camera view left/right
Number Keys 1-5: Select mutation type (1=Blocker, 2=Exploder, 3=Jumper, 4=Runner, 5=Tank)
Space: Apply selected mutation to nearest zombie
Z: Quick-select Blocker mutation
Shift: Speed up time (hold)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 던전 추적자 (Dungeon Tracer)
description: Navigate a dangerous dungeon by connecting adjacent tiles to form powerful combat chains! Each connection activates weapons, magic, or defense against encroaching monsters. Defeat 25 unique special enemies to level up and grow stronger. Collect gold to purchase items and unlock abilities from a vast arsenal. Survive as long as possible to maximize your score before the dungeon claims your life!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and tile cursor in dungeon
Space: Confirm selection, start/end path connection
Shift: Cancel current path connection
Z: Use special ability (when unlocked)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

title: Five Nights at Freddy's
description: You are a night security guard at Freddy's Pizza Parlor. Survive from 12 AM to 6 AM for five consecutive nights while hostile animatronics hunt you. Monitor security cameras to track their movements, but be careful—every action drains your limited power supply. If power runs out or an animatronic reaches your office with the doors open, it's game over. Each night gets progressively harder with more aggressive enemies and faster power drain.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate camera feeds and UI elements
Space: Toggle camera monitor view
Z: Toggle left door (hold to keep closed)
Shift: Toggle right door (hold to keep closed)
Left Arrow (when not in camera): Check left hallway light
Right Arrow (when not in camera): Check right hallway light
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Leo's Fortune
description: Guide Leo, a fluffy furball, through challenging platforming levels to recover stolen gold coins. Navigate through physics-based puzzles by inflating to float over gaps and deflating for precise movement. Avoid deadly spikes, timing-based traps, and environmental hazards. Collect all gold coins in each level to progress. Complete all levels to unlock Hardcore Mode where a single death means starting over!
controls:
Arrow Keys (LEFT/RIGHT): Move Leo horizontally
Arrow Key (UP): Inflate Leo to float and move faster
Arrow Key (DOWN): Deflate Leo for precise landings and slower movement
SPACE: Jump (when grounded)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

title: Cut the Rope: Time Travel
description: Guide the candy to feed both Om Nom and his ancestor by cutting ropes and activating physics-based mechanisms. Each level features suspended candy that must reach both monsters to complete the stage. Collect all three stars along the way for a perfect score. Navigate through historical eras with unique challenges - bubbles that float candy upward, air cushions that bounce objects, and gravity zones that alter physics. Strategic timing and rope cutting are essential to success!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Select which rope to cut or which device to activate
Space: Cut the selected rope or activate the selected device
R: Restart level (during gameplay)
Enter: Start game / Continue to next level
Esc: Pause / Unpause game

title: Lux DLX 3
description: Lux DLX 3 is a turn-based strategy game where you compete against an AI opponent to conquer all territories on the map. Each turn, receive reinforcements based on your controlled territories, deploy armies to your regions, and attack adjacent enemy territories. Combat is resolved through dice rolls - you need at least 3 armies to attack. Conquer at least one territory per turn to earn bonus cards that can be traded for extra reinforcements. Victory is achieved by controlling all territories on the map.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/select territories during deployment and attack phases
Space: Confirm selection (deploy armies, initiate attack, trade cards)
Z: End current phase (deployment/attack/fortification)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Sushi Cat
description: Drop Sushi Cat through a physics playground filled with delicious sushi! Position your cat at the top of the screen and watch as he bounces through obstacles, collecting sushi to fill his belly meter. You have limited drops per level - use them wisely to reach 100% fullness and advance through increasingly challenging layouts. Collect all the sushi you can to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys (LEFT/RIGHT): Move drop position horizontally at the top of the screen
SPACE: Drop Sushi Cat from current position
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart to title screen from game over

title: Ultimate Custom Night
description: Survive a single night from 12 AM to 6 AM in your office while managing power and defending against multiple animatronic characters. Each animatronic has unique behaviors and attack patterns. Use doors, vents, and various systems to prevent jumpscares while monitoring your limited power supply. Collect Faz-Coins to purchase defensive items and survive until 6 AM to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and UI elements
Space: Activate/toggle selected system (doors, vents, etc.)
Z: Quick-use emergency power boost
Shift: Open Prize Counter shop
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to main menu

title: Truth Seeker
description: You're trapped in a mysterious school trial! Navigate through crime scenes to collect Truth Bullets (evidence), then use them in fast-paced Class Trials to shoot down contradictory statements. Successfully identify the culprit by matching evidence to lies before time runs out. Each chapter increases in difficulty with more complex testimonies and faster statements. Fail to catch all lies or run out of time, and it's game over!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate character during Investigation phase
Space: Interact with objects/characters to collect Truth Bullets
Z: Fire Truth Bullets at contradictory statements during Class Trial
Shift: Slow down time briefly during Class Trial (limited uses)
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: LIFE: Road Trip - Island Adventure
description: Navigate a tropical island board game collecting memories and souvenirs! Spin the wheel to move forward, land on special spaces to collect items, take photos, or compete in mini-games. Reach the finish with the most happiness points to win. Complete challenges quickly for bonus points!
controls:
SPACE: Spin the wheel / Confirm action
ARROW KEYS: Navigate menu selections
Z: Quick action in mini-games
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Five Nights at Freddy's 3
description: Survive five nights in a haunted horror attraction office from 12 AM to 6 AM each night. Track the deadly animatronic Springtrap through security cameras and use audio lures to keep him away from your office. Seal vents to block his entry routes. Phantom animatronics will cause system failures that must be rebooted quickly. If Springtrap reaches your office, it's game over. Each night gets progressively harder with faster system failures and more aggressive behavior.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between camera feeds and systems on tablet
Space: Activate selected system (play audio lure, seal vent, reboot system)
Z: Toggle tablet view on/off
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to main menu

title: ICEY - Meta-Narrative Combat
description: You are ICEY, a cybernetic warrior fighting through waves of enemies in a mysterious facility. Battle through combat arenas, defeat enemies with fluid combos, and face off against powerful bosses. But there's a twist - a narrator guides your path. Will you follow their instructions, or defy them to uncover hidden secrets and alternate endings? Your choices shape the narrative as you fight for survival.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down
Space: Light attack (fast, can chain)
Shift: Heavy attack (powerful, slower)
Z: Dash (quick dodge with invincibility frames)
Up Arrow (while grounded): Jump
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 🍔 Burger Shop Story
description: Welcome to Burger Shop Story! Build and manage your hamburger restaurant empire. Create unique burger recipes by combining ingredients, hire and train staff to serve customers efficiently, and research new ingredients to expand your menu. Earn profits to upgrade your shop, unlock advanced recipes, and achieve the highest customer satisfaction rating. Your goal is to reach $10,000 in total revenue while maintaining a high satisfaction score.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and UI elements
Space: Confirm selection / Hire staff / Purchase items
Z: Cancel / Go back to previous menu
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Fun with Ragdolls
description: Create and experiment with physics-based chaos! Build elaborate contraptions using ragdolls, cannons, mines, fans, and other interactive objects. Watch as ragdolls interact with your creations through various AI behaviors. There's no winning or losing—just pure creative experimentation with realistic physics. Place objects, adjust their properties, spawn ragdolls with different behaviors, and observe the hilarious results!
controls:
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over)
Arrow Keys: Navigate build menu and adjust properties
SPACE: Place selected object or spawn ragdoll
1-5: Quick select object types (1=Ragdoll, 2=Cannon, 3=Mine, 4=Fan, 5=Wall)
D: Delete mode toggle
Z: Clear all objects

title: 開店コンビニ日記 - Convenience Store Story
description: Welcome to Convenience Store Story! Start with a small shop and grow it into a thriving convenience store empire. Place shelves strategically, stock popular products, and serve customers efficiently. Hire staff to help manage operations, unlock new product categories as you earn profits, and expand your store footprint. Watch customer satisfaction and adapt to their preferences to build a successful business. Your goal is to reach $50,000 in total revenue while maintaining high customer satisfaction!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate cursor to select grid tiles or UI elements
Space: Confirm selection (place shelf, stock product, hire staff, or expand store)
Z: Cancel/Go back to previous menu
Shift: Speed up time (hold to accelerate game speed)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

title: 君しかいない - You Are The Only One
description: Navigate through a dark, mysterious facility as the sole survivor. Explore interconnected rooms, examine objects for clues, and solve environmental puzzles to uncover the truth. Find keycards to unlock new areas, read journal entries to piece together the story, and discover one of multiple endings. Beware: wrong choices or dangerous encounters can lead to immediate game over. Your goal is to escape by finding all necessary items and making the right decisions.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects (examine, pick up items, read notes)
Shift: Sprint (moves faster, limited stamina)
Z: Use equipped item (keycard at doors)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu
Enter: Start game from menu

title: 无处遁形：全网公敌
description: You are a skilled hacker investigating a conspiracy. Use your desktop interface to search the web for clues, query databases to filter information, and crack passwords to access hidden accounts. Once inside, use the chat application to social engineer targets by selecting the right dialogue options. Each successful hack reveals more of the mystery. Complete all objectives to uncover the truth, but beware - too many failed password attempts will trigger security alerts and you'll lose the case!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between desktop applications and menu options
Space: Select/Open application or confirm choice
Z: Go back/Cancel action
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to main menu

title: 海姆达尔 HEIMDALLR
description: You are Jason, a hacker investigating a 15-year-old murder case. Navigate through alternating puzzle and parkour segments to uncover the truth. In puzzle mode, decrypt codes and combine items to reveal clues. In parkour mode, run, jump, and slide through dangerous environments. Collect data fragments to unlock different story endings. Complete all chapters to solve the mystery!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, move left/right in parkour mode
Space: Jump in parkour mode, Select/Interact in puzzle mode
Z: Slide under obstacles in parkour mode
Shift: Sprint in parkour mode
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Mindustry Lite
description: Build your factory, defend your core! Extract resources with drills, transport them via conveyors, and refine materials in factories. Use resources to build defensive turrets and units. Enemy waves attack every 45 seconds with increasing strength. Survive 10 waves to win, or lose if your core is destroyed. Plan your factory layout carefully to maximize production and defense!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move camera view
Space: Place selected building at cursor position
Z: Delete building at cursor position
Shift: Cycle through available buildings (Drill → Conveyor → Factory → Turret → Unit Factory)

title: Shadow Knight - Ninja Fighting Action RPG
description: You are a Shadow Knight, a legendary ninja warrior fighting through waves of dark fantasy creatures. Battle through multiple missions, defeating enemies to earn gold and equipment. Upgrade your attack and health stats between missions, unlock powerful skills, and progress through increasingly challenging encounters. Your goal is to complete all missions and defeat the final boss. If your health reaches zero, you must retry the mission.
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Arrow Up: Jump
Space: Basic attack (melee slash)
Z: Special skill - Shadow Strike (dash attack with cooldown)
Shift: Ultimate skill - Ninja Fury (area damage with longer cooldown)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: EXIT - Die Prüfung des Greifen
description: Escape from a haunted castle by solving 20 interconnected puzzles! Explore hand-drawn rooms, examine objects to find clues, collect items, and combine them to unlock new areas. Each puzzle builds on the last, requiring careful observation and logical deduction. Progress through the castle's mysterious chambers to find the final exit and your freedom.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between hotspots and menu options
Space: Examine/interact with highlighted hotspot or use selected item
Z: Open/close inventory menu
Shift: Select item in inventory (hold and press Arrow Keys to navigate, Space to confirm)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen

title: Fling!
description: Clear the board by strategically flinging furballs! Swipe a furball in any direction to send it sliding until it hits another furball or the edge. Push furballs off the screen to eliminate them. Your goal: leave only ONE furball remaining to complete each puzzle. Navigate through increasingly complex levels with more furballs and trickier layouts. Can you solve all the puzzles?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Select which furball to fling (highlight cycles through available furballs)
WASD Keys: Fling the selected furball (W=Up, A=Left, S=Down, D=Right)
Z Key: Undo last move
Space: Skip to next level (after completing current level)
Enter: Start game / Continue after level complete
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: The Talos Principle
description: Navigate through ancient ruins solving intricate puzzles to collect Sigils. Use tools like Jammers to disable turrets, Connectors to create energy beams, and Boxes to reach elevated areas. Each puzzle requires strategic placement of limited tools to unlock gates and progress. Collect all Sigils to complete your journey through the ruins.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move player forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects (pick up/place tools, activate switches)
Z: Drop currently held tool
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game

title: SPACEHOLES - Arcade Watch Defense
description: Defend your position in the center of a circular spacehole tunnel against waves of alien bugs! Your spaceship automatically fires at enemies approaching from the outer edges. Survive increasingly difficult waves as enemies spawn faster and new enemy types appear. Rack up points by destroying enemies, but beware - one collision ends your mission. How long can you survive in the depths of space?
controls:
Left Arrow: Rotate ship counter-clockwise around the tunnel
Right Arrow: Rotate ship clockwise around the tunnel
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Bounty Of One: Premium
description: Survive as long as possible in this Wild West bullet hell! Your hero automatically shoots at nearby enemies while you focus on dodging attacks. Collect experience orbs from fallen foes to level up and choose powerful upgrades. Enemy waves grow fiercer every 30 seconds, and deadly bosses appear every 5 minutes. Master positioning and upgrade selection to maximize your survival time!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your hero in four directions
Space: Select upgrade choice 1 (when leveling up)
Shift: Select upgrade choice 2 (when leveling up)
Z: Select upgrade choice 3 (when leveling up)
Enter: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Blackthorn Castle Mystery
description: Explore the mysterious Blackthorn Castle, a 14th-century fortress filled with secrets and puzzles. Navigate through interconnected rooms by clicking on doorways and interactive objects. Collect items into your inventory and use them to solve puzzles that unlock new areas. Your goal is to explore the entire castle, solve all puzzles, and uncover the castle's deepest secret hidden in the throne room. Track your progress with the map, take photos of clues with your camera, and use hints when stuck.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate cursor for selecting hotspots and UI buttons
Space: Select/activate highlighted hotspot or button
Z: Open/close inventory panel
Shift: Use camera to photograph current room (up to 10 photos)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

title: Blending Cafe Story
description: Welcome to Blending Cafe Story! Manage your dream cafe by creating delicious recipes, serving customers, and expanding your business. Combine ingredients to craft unique drinks and food items, then serve them to customers with different preferences. Earn money to unlock new ingredients, upgrade your cafe, and work towards achieving a prestigious 5-Star rating. Balance customer satisfaction, recipe creativity, and strategic upgrades to build the ultimate cafe empire!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Navigate through menus and select items
Space: Confirm selection / Create recipe / Serve customer
Z: Cancel / Go back to previous menu
Shift: Toggle between Cafe View and Recipe Lab
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Kiwanuka
description: Guide your glowing Kiwanuka citizens across challenging platforms to reach the exit portal! Stack citizens into towers by selecting them with Z, then topple the towers with arrow keys to create bridges across gaps. You must guide at least 70% of your citizens safely to the exit to complete each level. Watch out for deadly falls and unreachable areas!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the guide staff to direct citizens / Topple tower in direction
Z: Select/deselect citizen to build tower
Space: Release selected citizen from tower
Shift: Speed up citizen movement
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: DYSMANTLE
description: You are a survivor in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Your mission is to escape the island by clearing monster-infested zones, gathering resources from destructible objects, and crafting better equipment. Break objects to collect materials, defeat enemies to gain experience, and establish outposts to secure safe zones. Manage your health and stamina carefully as you explore, craft, and fight your way to freedom.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Attack with your current weapon (consumes stamina)
Z: Interact with objects to break them or use crafting stations
Shift: Sprint (consumes stamina while moving)
Enter: Start the game
Esc: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: ☕ Cafe Master Story
description: Manage your dream coffee shop in Cafe Master Story! Place furniture to boost atmosphere, research recipes by combining ingredients, and serve customers to earn revenue and popularity. Satisfy customers to unlock regulars and higher-tier demographics. Expand your cafe, participate in Combo Meal contests, and aim for a Five-Star rating. Reach popularity milestones to relocate to new towns with unique challenges!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select items
Space: Confirm selection / Place item / Serve customer
Shift: Open/Close menu system
Z: Cancel / Go back
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Old Man's Journey
description: Guide an old man through beautiful landscapes by shaping the terrain beneath his feet. The old man walks automatically along connected paths. Your task is to manipulate terrain layers by dragging them up or down to create continuous walkable surfaces. Each level presents a puzzle where you must adjust multiple overlapping terrain sections to help the old man reach his destination. There is no failure - take your time to explore and solve each scenic puzzle at your own pace.
controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Select terrain layer to manipulate
Arrow Keys (↑/↓): Raise or lower selected terrain layer
Space: Confirm terrain adjustment and let the old man walk
R: Restart current level
Enter: Start game / Continue to next level
ESC: Pause/Unpause game

title: Florence: An Interactive Story
description: Experience Florence's emotional journey through interactive mini-games that tell her story. Each scene presents a unique interaction that mirrors the narrative moment - from the excitement of first conversations to the warmth of togetherness and the pain of heartbreak. Complete each mini-game by following intuitive prompts to advance through Florence's relationship story, from meeting someone special to self-discovery.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move/Navigate elements • Space: Select/Confirm action • Z: Alternative interaction<game_description>
Experience Florence's emotional journey through a series of interactive story vignettes. Each scene presents a unique mini-game that metaphorically represents a moment in her life - from forming connections through conversations, to building relationships through shared activities, to dealing with conflicts and changes. Complete simple, intuitive interactions to progress through the narrative and witness Florence's story unfold from beginning to end.
</game_description>

<game_controls>
Arrow Keys: Navigate selections, move objects, or interact with scene elements
Space: Confirm action, select, or interact with current element
Z: Alternative action or undo in certain scenes
Shift: Hold to modify actions or slow down movements
Enter: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Lost Island 2: The Ashes of Time
description: Explore the mysterious Lost Island through interconnected hand-drawn scenes. Investigate hotspots, collect items, and solve intricate puzzles to uncover the island's secrets. Combine items from your inventory, decipher codes, and manipulate mechanisms to progress. Navigate between locations using discovered pathways and use your collected items strategically to unlock new areas and complete the narrative.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between hotspots and UI elements
Space: Interact with selected hotspot or use selected inventory item
Shift: Cycle through inventory items
Z: Examine selected item or read clues
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)

title: Danganronpa: Trial of Truth
description: Welcome to Danganronpa: Trial of Truth! You are a student trapped in a deadly game where you must solve murder mysteries to survive. During the Nonstop Debate phase, statements scroll across the screen with highlighted weak points (contradictions). Use your collected Truth Bullets (evidence) to shoot at these weak points to expose the lies. You have 5 Influence Points - losing all means Game Over. Successfully expose all contradictions to win the trial and escape!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Select Truth Bullet from inventory
Space: Fire selected Truth Bullet at weak point
Z: Absorb statement as new Truth Bullet (when available)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen

title: TOUCH CRICKET
description: Touch Cricket is a fast-paced batting simulation where you face increasingly challenging bowling deliveries. Time your shots perfectly by combining footwork and directional strokes to score runs. Each ball requires precise timing - mistimed shots can lead to getting out. Build your score while managing your 10 wickets across different delivery types including fast balls, spinners, and yorkers. Survive and score big to progress through career levels!
controls:
Arrow Up/W: Front Foot Shot
Arrow Down/S: Back Foot Shot
Arrow Left/A: Off Side Shot (Left)
Arrow Right/D: On Side Shot (Right)
Space: Defensive Block
Shift: Power Shot (Hold with direction)
Z: Late Cut/Flick Shot
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from Game Over)

title: 异星要塞 - Alien Fortress
description: Navigate through procedurally generated alien dungeons in your combat mech, surviving intense bullet-hell waves. Your turrets automatically fire at enemies while you focus on dodging deadly projectiles. Collect resources from defeated aliens to upgrade your mech temporarily during your run. Reach the dungeon exit to progress through increasingly challenging levels. If your mech's health reaches zero, the run ends.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your mech in eight directions
Space: Dash to quickly evade danger (cooldown applies)
Shift: Activate shield for temporary invulnerability (limited charges)
Z: Toggle auto-fire mode on/off
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart (return to start screen)
ENTER: Start the game

title: Professor Layton and the Devil's Box
description: Guide Professor Layton through mysterious locations to uncover the truth behind the Devil's Box. Explore environments by navigating with arrow keys, collect Hint Coins hidden throughout each area, and solve increasingly challenging logic puzzles to progress. Use collected coins to purchase hints when puzzles become difficult. Complete all mandatory puzzles to unlock new story segments and reach the final revelation.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Professor Layton through the environment
Space: Interact with objects, characters, and hotspots / Confirm puzzle solutions
Z: Use a Hint Coin in puzzle mode (costs 1 coin)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: EVOLAND
description: Evoland is a retro adventure where your game world literally evolves as you play! Start in a primitive monochrome realm and unlock new features like color, scrolling camera, and enhanced combat by discovering evolution chests. Battle enemies, collect treasure, and progress through the story to transform your simple adventure into a full-featured RPG experience. Defeat the final boss to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character in 4 directions
Space: Attack enemies / Interact with chests
Z: Activate dodge roll (unlocked later)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen after game over

title: Refind Self
description: Welcome to "Refind Self," a personality diagnosis adventure! You are a robot exploring a mysterious facility filled with other robots. Move around, interact with characters, solve simple puzzles, and make dialogue choices. Every action you take is analyzed to build your unique personality profile. There are no wrong choices—just be yourself! Complete the game to discover your personality type, then play again to unlock new paths and profiles.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your robot character around the world
Space: Interact with objects and NPCs, advance dialogue, select choices
Z: Alternative action/quick select in dialogues
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart from the beginning
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen

title: Cosmic Survival
description: Survive waves of Cthulhu monsters in this intense top-down survival shooter. Eliminate enemies to gain experience and level up, choosing from powerful skill upgrades to enhance your abilities. Survive for 5 minutes to win, or see how long you can last. Your health depletes when hit - avoid enemies and use your growing arsenal of abilities to stay alive!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Fire your weapon in the direction you're facing
Z: Activate special ability (when unlocked)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: OCTAGON RUSH
description: Navigate through an infinite octagonal tunnel that scrolls toward you at increasing speeds. Your avatar stays fixed in the center while the tunnel rotates around you. Align yourself with clear paths to avoid obstacles like speed bumps. Survive for 60 seconds to win, or push for the highest score before time runs out or you crash. The tunnel accelerates and obstacles become more complex as you progress!
controls:
Left Arrow: Rotate tunnel clockwise (move avatar counter-clockwise around tunnel)
Right Arrow: Rotate tunnel counter-clockwise (move avatar clockwise around tunnel)
Space: Flip 180 degrees to opposite side of tunnel
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: MYSTERIUM: Digital Deduction
description: You are a Psychic trying to solve a murder mystery by interpreting abstract vision cards sent by a Ghost. Each round, the Ghost will send you a vision card to help you identify the correct Suspect, Location, and Weapon. Study the vision carefully, then select your choice. Progress through all three stages before time runs out to solve the mystery and win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through card selections
Space: Confirm your selection
Z: View current vision card in detail (hold)

title: Shoot The Zombirds
description: Defend your precious pumpkin patch from waves of mutant Zombirds! Fire crossbow bolts by pressing the arrow keys to aim and SPACE to shoot. Each wave brings more dangerous enemies with varying health and speeds. Earn coins to upgrade your crossbow between waves. Survive as long as possible - if all 5 pumpkins are destroyed, it's game over!
controls:
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT): Aim crossbow in that direction
SPACE: Fire crossbow bolt
SHIFT: Activate multi-shot power (when available)
Z: Activate shield power (when available)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (returns to start screen)
